SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-08-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, LUIS A IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PACIFIC CRATING AND SHIPPING, L.L.C. THE JUDGMENT IS WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO ANY CLAIM THAT PLAINTIFF MAY HAVE AGAINST ATLAS INTERNATIONAL MOVERS OR OTHER PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
